js.home: const cate=env.get("category");const page=env.get("page");let url;if(cate=="/"){url=env.baseUrl;}else{url=`${env.baseUrl}/index.php/vod/type/id/${cate}/page/${page}.html`;}const $=utils.kitty.load(await utils.req(url));return $(".videoContent li").toArray().map(item=>{const a=$(item).find(".videoName");const id=a.attr("href")??"";const title=a.text().trim();const cover="";const remark=$(item).find(".time").text().trim();return{id,title,cover,remark};});
js.detail: const id=env.get("movieId");const url=`${env.baseUrl}${id}`;const $=utils.kitty.load(await utils.req(url));const desc="жҡӮж— з®Җд»Ӣ";const playlist=[{title:"ж’ӯж”ҫжәҗ",videos:[{id:id,text:"ж’ӯж”ҫ"}]}];return{desc,playlist};
